name: Wild Rice-Turkey Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp red or white wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the wild rice in water until tender, about 50 minutes.
2. Cut the turkey into bite-size pieces.
3. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and toss.
4. Cover and chill until ready to serve.
5. Sprinkle pecans on top just before serving.
